originContent: Predict orbits of asteroids and comets at large scales.
translatedContent: 预测小行星和彗星的大规模轨道。

originContent: The kete tools are intended to enable the simulation of all-sky surveys of minor
translatedContent: kete 工具旨在实现对全天空小行星巡天的模拟。包括多体物理轨道动力学、轨道确定与拟合、天体的热学和光学建模，以及视场和光延迟校正。这些工具结合小行星中心（MPC）和 JPL 已知小行星数据库，不仅可用于规划巡天，也可用于预测现有或过去巡天中可见的天体。

originContent: planets. This includes multi-body physics orbital dynamics, orbit determination and
fitting, thermal and optical modeling of the objects, as well as field of view and light
translatedContent: kete 的主要目标是实现一套工具，能够一次性处理整个 MPC 目录，无需针对特定天体进行查询。它已被用于模拟 NEO Surveyor 任务超过 10 年的巡天时间，涵盖 1000 万颗主带和近地小行星。

originContent: delay corrections. These tools in conjunction with the Minor Planet Centers (MPC) and
JPL's databases of known asteroids can be used to not only plan surveys but can also be
used to predict what objects are visible for existing or past surveys.
The primary goal for kete is to enable a set of tools that can operate on the entire
MPC catalog at once, without having to do queries on specific objects. It has been
used to simulate over 10 years of survey time for the NEO Surveyor mission using 10

translatedContent: 以下是 ZTF 巡天在整个 2023 年期间的模拟观测结果。
这是每个编号小行星的每个位置，以及预期的 V 波段星等计算。
如果预期星等低于 ZTF 针对特定帧报告的星等极限，则该天体将以浅灰色闪烁显示。
该计算在一台台式机上耗时约 50 分钟，生成动画约 40 分钟。

originContent: Here is a simulation of what the ZTF survey would observe during the entirety of 2023.
This is every position of every numbered asteroid, along with a calculation of the
expected V-band magnitudes. If the expected magnitude is less than ZTF's reported
magnitude limit for the specific frame, then the object will flash light grey.
This took about 50 minutes on a desktop computer to compute, and about 40 minutes

'Kete' 源自古希腊神话，意为海怪，是鲸目动物（鲸鱼）的词根。

originContent: 'Kete' comes from ancient greek mythology, meaning sea monsters, and is the root word

translatedContent: 该代码的最初版本由原作者（Dar Dahlen）在加州理工学院IPAC工作期间开发。本仓库是该代码的一个分支，后续工作将作为个人项目继续进行。本分支与之前代码的区别采用BSD 3-Clause许可，但版权归Dar Dahlen及未来合作者所有。

originContent: The original version of this code was developed while the original author (Dar Dahlen)
was working at Caltech IPAC. This is a fork of that repo where the work will continue as
translatedContent: Kete 使用ICRF参考系作为基础坐标系，单位为天文单位（AU），时间采用带有重心动力时间（TDB）标度的儒略日（JD）。内部此参考系转换为黄道坐标系，该坐标系由JPL Horizons使用的黄赤交角定义，采用J2000框架下的IAU76/80模型。

originContent: a personal project. Difference between this fork and previous code is licensed as
BSD 3-Clause but copyright to Dar Dahlen & future collaborators.

translatedContent: JPL Horizons和小行星中心（MPC）均使用该坐标系，本质上等同于J2000黄道坐标。kete提供转换工具，可实现到赤道坐标系及多种时间系统的转换。

originContent: Kete uses the ICRF Reference frame as the base coordinate frame, with units of AU,
with time in JD with Barycentric Dynamical Time (TDB) scaling. Internally this frame
converted to an Ecliptic coordinate system which is defined by the Obliquity Angle
definition used by JPL Horizons, which is the defined IAU76/80 model in the J2000 frame.
translatedContent: kete中许多操作会下载各种文件。这些文件会自动缓存，缓存目录可通过设置环境变量 `KETE_CACHE_DIR` 来指定。默认目录为 `~/.kete/`。

originContent: Both JPL Horizons and the Minor Planet Center (MPC) use this coordinate frame, which is
essentially equivalent to J2000 Ecliptic coordinates. Conversion tools are available in
kete which enable conversion to the Equatorial frame and to various flavors of time.
Many operations in kete result in downloading various files. These files are cached
automatically, the directory where this cache is stored may be set by setting the
environment variable `KETE_CACHE_DIR`. The default directory is `~/.kete/`.
Be aware that kete downloads several large SPICE kernel files on first use, which are
translatedContent: 请注意，kete 在首次使用时会下载多个大型 SPICE 内核文件，
并将其保存到缓存目录中。

originContent: - If you trigger the download **during the Docker build** (e.g.,
translatedContent: - 如果你在 Docker 构建过程中触发下载（例如，

originContent: `RUN python -c "import kete"`), the files will be baked into the image.
translatedContent: `RUN python -c "import kete"`），这些文件将被打包进镜像。

originContent: - If you skip this step, the files will download on first container run but
translatedContent: - 如果跳过此步骤，文件将在首次容器运行时下载，

originContent: **will be lost when the container stops** unless you use a volume mount for the cache
translatedContent: 但除非你为缓存目录使用卷挂载，否则

originContent: python -c "import kete"  # Triggers kernel downloads during build
translatedContent: python -c "import kete"  # Triggers kernel downloads during build
这确保了 SPICE 内核是您镜像的一部分，无需重新下载。

originContent: This ensures the SPICE kernels are part of your image and don't need re-downloading.

Tutorials are computationally expensive examples which are more indicative of typical
translatedContent: 教程是计算量较大的示例，更能反映典型的预期使用情况。由于这些示例运行成本较高，除非手动执行，否则不会运行。

originContent: expected use. Since these examples are so expensive to run, they are not run unless
translatedContent: 提供了一个便捷的 Python 脚本来专门完成此操作。

originContent: manually performed. A convenience python script has been provided to do just this.
